docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PLAINTIFF IRENE MOTOVILOFF IS NOT PRESENT. APPEARANCE BY MATTHEW LARUE DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,804.00 FILED BY MOTOVILOFF, IRENE AS TO DEFENDANT LARUE, MATTHEW ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-22-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOTOVILOFF, IRENE AS TO DEFENDANT LARUE, MATTHEW

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-22-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-15-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IRENE MOTOVILOFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MATTHEW LARUE IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT OF $1935, PAID BY FOUR (4) PAYMENTS ON THE 15TH OF EACH MONTH IN THE AMOUNT OF $483.75 BY CHECK TO THE PLAINTIFF. THE FIRST PAYMENT IS DUE ON JUL-15-2021. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE NOV-15-2021 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PLEASE SEE SIGNATURE SERVED MAR-11-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LARUE, MATTHEW
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
